Uses of Class
org.apache.juneau.http.resource.HttpResourceBean

Packages that use HttpResourceBean
Package
Description
org.apache.juneau.http.resource
Next-generation HTTP resource types — bodies bundled with associated headers.

  • Uses of HttpResourceBean in org.apache.juneau.http.resource

    Methods in org.apache.juneau.http.resource that return HttpResourceBean
    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    static HttpResourceBean
    HttpResourceBean.of(HttpBody body)
    Creates an HttpResourceBean wrapping the given body with no additional headers.
    static HttpResourceBean
    HttpResourceBean.of(HttpBody body, List<HttpHeader> headers)
    Creates an HttpResourceBean wrapping the given body and headers.
    HttpResourceBean
    HttpResourceBean.withHeader(String name, String value)
    Returns a new instance with the given header name and value added.
    HttpResourceBean
    HttpResourceBean.withHeader(HttpHeader header)
    Returns a new instance with the given header added.
    HttpResourceBean
    HttpResourceBean.withHeaders(List<HttpHeader> toAdd)
    Returns a new instance with the given headers added.
    HttpResourceBean
    HttpResourceBean.withHeaders(HttpHeader... toAdd)
    Returns a new instance with the given headers added.
